Before selecting a stack, I would ask clarifying questions: who are the teams, what planning pain is most expensive, what workflow exists today, what success criteria matter, and what constraints are fixed?

The product goals are better planning, clearer coordination, and easier decisions. Implementation assumptions, such as realtime collaboration or integrations, should stay separate until validated. Next-step plan: interview users, define one MVP workflow, choose acceptance checks, then select the simplest stack.
